headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 14, 2026**
article:
The day's top MLB news saw several teams fall to their opponents, while others made significant roster moves. Here's a breakdown of the day's action:

Top News
The Seattle Mariners took down the Houston Astros 6-2, with Josh Naylor leading the Astros' offense with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs. George Kirby earned the win for the Mariners with 7.2 innings pitched and 6 strikeouts. The Baltimore Orioles secured a 9-7 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5, marking a tough outing for the team. The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Chicago Cubs, securing a 13-7 victory.

Injuries and Availability Impact
Several teams suffered injuries to key players, affecting their lineups and pitching rotations. The Los Angeles Dodgers placed RHP Ben Casparius on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The Baltimore Orioles transferred RHP Yaramil Hiraldo from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The Washington Nationals placed LHP Ken Waldichuk on the 15-day injured list due to left forearm tightness and RHP Cole Henry on the 15-day injured list due to a right rotator cuff strain.

Trades and Roster Movement
The Baltimore Orioles acquired 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash. The Philadelphia Phillies acquired RF Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired 2B Lenyn Sosa from the Chicago White Sox in exchange for OF Jordan Rich and future considerations.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Mariners in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners took down the Houston Astros 6-2, handing them their latest defeat. Josh Naylor led the Astros' offense with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs, but it wasn't enough to overcome the strong performance of George Kirby, who earned the win with 7.2 innings pitched and 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Orioles in Thrilling Matchup**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 9-7 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Jeremiah Jackson leading the charge at the plate. Jackson's impressive performance included three hits, two home runs, and five RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Blowout Loss in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to the Pittsburgh Pirates 16-5, marking a tough outing for the team. Paul Skenes led the Pirates' pitching effort with 6.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Phillies Rout Cubs 13-7**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Chicago Cubs, securing a 13-7 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a pair of home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Dodgers RHP Ben Casparius Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Ben Casparius has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. The injury occurred on April 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Christian Encarnacion-Strand in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash.
